Hose Bibs & Electrical Additions — No Cost Change
Rodriguez Residence – Oak Valley Estates Lot 5
NO COST CHANGE ORDER: This change order adds scope to the contract at no additional cost to the Owner. Contract sum remains unchanged.
Add 2× frost-free hose bibs at upper level exterior per plan
Add 2× 120V duplex outlets in basement panic room
1. Add 2× Frost-Free Hose Bibs — Upper Level Exterior

Two frost-free hose bibs are added to the upper level exterior at locations indicated on the plan. Hose bibs to be frost-free sillcock type, connected to domestic cold water supply. Locations shown on upper level plan below.
Per upper level plan — see reference below
No cost — included in base contract scope
Plumbing contractor to coordinate exact penetration locations with GC prior to rough-in. Verify insulation and air sealing at each wall penetration.
Reference — Upper Level Plan showing Hose Bib Locations (HB):
2. Add 2× Duplex Outlets — Basement Panic Room

Two 120V duplex outlets are added inside the basement panic room. Outlets to be standard 20A duplex receptacles on dedicated circuit. Locations to be confirmed at field walk with GC. Plan reference shown below.
Standard AFF unless noted otherwise by GC
Per electrical plan — see reference below
No cost — included in base contract scope
Electrical contractor to coordinate outlet locations with GC prior to rough-in. Confirm circuit sizing and panel assignment with electrical engineer of record.
Reference — Basement Panic Room Plan showing Outlet Locations:

By signing below, Owner authorizes RAC Incorporated to proceed with the scope of work described in Change Order CO-006. This change order is issued at no additional cost to the Owner. This change order becomes part of the contract documents upon execution.
